description:
Backlog anchor: `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → **Tier 1 / section 2. Continuous/background observation, but only next-turn publication**.

Goal: implement incremental observation during long runs while keeping the public injected block and pruning cursor frozen until the run finishes.

Relevant code paths:
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/index.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/engine.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/state.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/observation-timing-deviation.md`

Worker notes:
- this is the ticket that must respect the agreed design constraint most carefully
- raw context should remain available mid-turn; do not mutate the public system prompt or let pruning outrun published observations
- if new lifecycle hooks/helpers are introduced, keep the published-vs-draft boundary explicit
title: Observe incrementally during long runs without changing the public prompt mid-turn
